Which is the word that is spelled correctly?
imediate
emmediate
immediate
immediete
The word that is spelled correctly is "immediate."

Which is the word that is spelled correctly?
maintainance
maintainence
maintenence
maintenance
The word that is spelled correctly is "maintenance."

Which is the word that is spelled correctly?
perseverense
perceverence
perseverance
perceverance
The word that is spelled correctly is "perseverance."

Which is the word that is spelled correctly?
pronunchation
pronunciation
pronouncation
pronounciation
The word that is spelled correctly is "pronunciation."

Which is the word that is spelled correctly?
questionnair
questionaire
questionair
questionnaire
The word that is spelled correctly is "questionnaire."

The passage is recommending a weekend stay at The Grosvenor Hotel. Despite its cost, the passage states that the hotel is worth every penny. The hotel is located on a rocky promontory north of the town, close to beautiful and unspoilt beaches. The area is also known for its caves and rock pools. The hotel is praised for its excellent food, friendly staff, and idyllic surroundings. Compared to other hotels in the area, the passage suggests that The Grosvenor Hotel offers good value for money.

The passage seems to recommend a weekend stay at The Grosvenor Hotel, suggesting that it may be a bit expensive (around 400 pounds) but worth the cost. The hotel is described as being situated on a rocky promontory north of the town, with stunning, unspoilt beaches within walking distance. Exploring the caves and rock pools during low tide is also mentioned. The passage highlights that there is minimal tourist traffic compared to many other beautiful places. The hotel is praised for its excellent food, friendly staff, and idyllic surroundings. It is suggested that the Grosvenor Hotel represents exceptional value for money compared to other hotels in the area.

Not _______ Travels with Charlie, it is difficult for me to say what I think of the author's views.
having been reading
that I have read
having read
have I read
Not having read Travels with Charlie, it is difficult for me to say what I think of the author's views.

We looked everywhere for him but nowhere _______ ?
could he be found.
he could be found.
could we find him.
we could find him.
We looked everywhere for him but nowhere could he be found.

If you wish to travel around the world, you _______ save some money.
had better
had to
have better
should better
If you wish to travel around the world, you had better save some money.

I don't object to _______ as he will be an asset to the hotel.
him being taken on
he be taken on
him be taken on
he being taken on
I don't object to him being taken on as he will be an asset to the hotel.

If you can win the famous chef's attention _______
so much the better
the so much better
the better so much
so the much better
If you can win the famous chef's attention, so much the better.

Across Antarctica on foot 

At nine-thirty Geoff’s team rolled out into the lead position, heading south. A misty snow fell and clouds hugged the surface. The dogs were crazy to pull, but their wildness threatened to upset the sleds. The morning’s battle was to try to contain them until they burned off their extra energy. For that reason alone, we appreciated the deep snow, because it made the dogs work harder and slowed them down. 

By late morning the surfaces levelled out and became harder packed, and the skies cleared. The parting clouds revealed a beautiful scene, resembling a white moonscape. The ice-covered mountains that bordered us on both sides were drifted with deep snow. Delicate ice crystals filled the air, and sunlight refracting off them created a sparkling display of rainbows, pillars and halos. 

In front of our dog-sleds the snow’s surface was covered with gleaming prisms, each reflecting the sunlight in a multi-coloured spectrum. In the distance a low fog hugged the horizon. All day – we travelled nearly nineteen miles – we watched Antarctica’s beauty unfold. This was a region few men have seen at this time of year, and we sledded through it reverentially, quiet but for the rasping of the dogs and our own periodic shouting to encourage them.
The writer suggests that the explorers..

were threatened by the dog's lack of discipline.
had some problems handling the dogs.
found the dogs uncontrollable.
treated their dogs with little consideration.
The writer suggests that the explorers had some problems handling the dogs.

Read the text about Antarctica's beauty and answer the questions.
Across Antarctica on foot 

At nine-thirty Geoff’s team rolled out into the lead position, heading south. A misty snow fell and clouds hugged the surface. The dogs were crazy to pull, but their wildness threatened to upset the sleds. The morning’s battle was to try to contain them until they burned off their extra energy. For that reason alone, we appreciated the deep snow, because it made the dogs work harder and slowed them down. 

By late morning the surfaces levelled out and became harder packed, and the skies cleared. The parting clouds revealed a beautiful scene, resembling a white moonscape. The ice-covered mountains that bordered us on both sides were drifted with deep snow. Delicate ice crystals filled the air, and sunlight refracting off them created a sparkling display of rainbows, pillars and halos. 

In front of our dog-sleds the snow’s surface was covered with gleaming prisms, each reflecting the sunlight in a multi-coloured spectrum. In the distance a low fog hugged the horizon. All day – we travelled nearly nineteen miles – we watched Antarctica’s beauty unfold. This was a region few men have seen at this time of year, and we sledded through it reverentially, quiet but for the rasping of the dogs and our own periodic shouting to encourage them.
On the described afternoon the explorers were..

deeply affected by what they saw.
slowed down by the unusual light conditions.
hindered by the snow conditions.
sad to leave the scene they found
On the described afternoon, the explorers were deeply affected by what they saw.

Hi Firas,
 

My name is <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON> and I´m part of Tech Mahindra Recruiting Team in Portugal.

 

We´ve received your cv from Indeed and we would like to have a small initial call (10/15 minutes) with you for the Content Reviewer position, also to know you a little better and to give you more details about the company and about our projects, so we can both see if it makes sense to you to be part of the recruiting process.

 

Can you, please, give us your availability to talk in the next few days?


Best Regards,

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for reaching out to me. I am available for a small initial call regarding the Content Reviewer position. I would be happy to learn more about the company, your projects, and determine if I am a suitable fit for the role. 

Please let me know what dates and times work best for you in the next few days, and I will make sure to accommodate the call accordingly.

Best regards,
Firas
make this email profesional

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this email finds you well. My name is <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, and I am reaching out to you as a part of the Tech Mahindra Recruiting Team in Portugal.

We recently came across your impressive CV on Indeed, and we believe that you may be a great fit for the Content Reviewer position that we have available. We would like to invite you for a brief introductory call, approximately 10-15 minutes, where we can discuss the position in more detail and get a chance to know you better. This will also provide you with an opportunity to learn more about our company and the exciting projects we are currently working on.

We highly value your time and want to ensure that this opportunity aligns with your interests and aspirations. Therefore, we believe that this initial call will be beneficial for both parties to determine if proceeding with the recruitment process is the right step.

Kindly let us know your availability in the next few days for the call, and we will do our best to accommodate your schedule accordingly.

Thank you for considering this opportunity, and we look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
